UpdateSourceArgs: -c "set -e; echo '[RealRTCW] Preloading SteamCMD bootstrap packages with curl'; cd /AMP; mkdir -p /home/amp/Steam/package /home/amp/Steam/logs /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd; curl -fsSL -o /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steam_cmd_linux https://media.steampowered.com/client/steam_cmd_linux; grep -oE '[a-z0-9_]+\.zip\.[a-f0-9]+' /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steam_cmd_linux | sort -u | while read package; do echo \"[RealRTCW] Downloading $package\"; curl -4 -fsSL -o \"/tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/$package\" \"https://media.steampowered.com/client/$package\"; unzip -oq \"/tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/$package\" -d /AMP; done; cp /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steam_cmd_linux /home/amp/Steam/package/steam_cmd_linux; echo '[RealRTCW] SteamCMD bootstrap preload complete'"
